name: com.maxenceguidez.mxunikit.ui
description: Provides UI Toolkit foundations for a layered UI in a project. It includes a base view with a show and hide lifecycle, a menu navigator with history, and a dialog stack manager built on a shared layer manager. Together these pieces give a project a consistent way to structure menus and dialogs without rebuilding navigation logic each time.

samples.description: Demonstrates a code-first UI wiring MxMenuUiManager and MxOverlayUiManager with three menus (Home, Settings, Pause) and a confirmation dialog.
